title: The Dakshina Bharat Hindi Prachar Sabha Act, 1964
full_text: The Dakshina Bharat Hindi Prachar Sabha Act, 1964 दक्षिण भारत हिन्‍दी प्रचार सभा अधिनियम, 1964 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196414 Act Number: 14 Enactment Date: 1964-05-12 Act Year: 1964 Short Title: The Dakshina Bharat Hindi Prachar Sabha Act, 1964 Hindi Title: दक्षिण भारत हिन्‍दी प्रचार सभा अधिनियम, 1964 Long Title: An Act to declare the institution known as the Dakshina Bharat Hindi Prachar Sabha, having at present its registered office at Madras, to be an institution of national importance and to provide for certain matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 01-06-1964 Notification: 1st June, 1964, vide notification No. S.O. 1898, dated 30th May, 1964, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Dakshina Bharat Hindi Prachar Sabha Act, 1964 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Declaration of the Dakshina Bharat Hindi Prachar Sabha as an institution of national importance. Section 4. Grant of degrees, diplomas and certificates by the Sabha. Section 5. Accounts and Audit. Section 6. Prior approval of the Central Government necessary for certain action by the Sabha. Section 7.
